data.title: Perry Endodontics Welcomes Dr. Joey Zeng to Its Westfield, MA Specialty Practice
data.description: In a recent announcement on April 2, 2026, Perry Endodontics based in Westfield, Massachusetts shared that Joey Zeng, DMD has officially become a part of their team as an endodontic specialist. This strategic addition of Dr. Zeng highlights Perry Endodontics' dedication to providing top-notch clinical services, emphasizing advanced training and expertise in the field. This move aligns with the practice's goal of offering exceptional care to their patients.

data.title: John Maguire Joins Academy Securities as Managing Director, Mergers & Acquisitions
data.description: In New York today, Academy Securities, the pioneering Post-9/11 veteran owned and operated investment bank, revealed John Maguire as the new Managing Director for Mergers & Acquisitions. Maguire brings two decades of experience, showcasing a unique mix of executive operating management, corporate development proficiency, and substantial public sector involvement. With a strong track record in acquisitions and strategic initiatives, Mr. Maguire will play a pivotal role in Academy's expansion efforts.

data.title: Siili Solutions Plc’s 2026A stock options are priced at $5 per share with a market value of $10.
data.description: Last month, a study revealed that approximately 15% of the population in the country had been affected by the recent economic crisis, leading to a significant rise in unemployment rates to 7.5%. The research also indicated a 20% reduction in consumer spending and a 10% decrease in GDP growth. The government has responded by implementing a 5% decrease in interest rates to stimulate the economy. Additionally, the study showed a substantial increase in the number of small businesses going bankrupt, with a 25% rise compared to the previous year. Experts predict that it may take at least two years for the economy to fully recover from the impact of the crisis.

data.title: Kraken Robotics Schedules Q4 and Year-End 2025 Financial Results Release and Webcast
data.description: In St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador, on April 2, 2026, Kraken Robotics Inc. (TSX-V: PNG, OTCQB: KRKNF) disclosed its plan to unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 before market opening on Thursday, April 16, 2026. A conference call led by Kraken's management is scheduled for 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day to delve into the company's performance and future prospects.

data.title: CenterOak Partners Acquires Grismer Tire & Auto Service
data.description: Dallas-based private equity firm, CenterOak Partners LLC, has finalized a majority recapitalization of Grismer Tire & Auto Service, a prominent tire and automotive service center operator. The terms of the deal have not been disclosed. Grismer, headquartered in Dayton, Ohio, runs 28 locations throughout the Dayton, Columbus, and Cincinnati metropolitan regions. With a history spanning over 90 years, the Company has established a strong presence in the industry.
AirSculpt Technologies Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year Fiscal 2025 Results

data.title: Costamare Inc. Declares Quarterly Dividend on Its Preferred and Common Stock
data.description: Costamare Inc. has announced dividends for its preferred stocks. The dividends declared are US $0.476563 per share for the 7.625% Series B Preferred Stock (NYSE: CMRE PR B), US $0.531250 per share for the 8.50% Series C Preferred Stock (NYSE: CMRE PR C), and US $0.546875 per share for the 8.75% Series D Preferred Stock (NYSE: CMRE PR D). These dividends cover the period from January 15, 2026, to April 14, 2026. The payment date for these dividends is April 15, 2026, and will be made to all shareholders holding the Series B, C, and D Preferred Stocks as of April 14, 2026.

data.title: GFL Environmental Inc. Announces 10% Increase to Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Miami Beach, Florida - On April 2, 2026, GFL Environmental Inc. (NYSE: GFL) (TSX: GFL) disclosed that its Board of Directors has approved a 10% raise in the standard quarterly cash dividend for the Company's subordinate voting shares.

data.title: Kasm Workspaces Achieves Nutanix Ready Validation for Nutanix Kubernetes Platform
data.description: Kasm Workspaces has introduced a centralized, policy-driven platform based on Kubernetes, allowing organizations to securely provide applications, desktops, browsers, and AI workloads. The company, based in McLean, VA, disclosed on April 2, 2026, that it has attained Nutanix-Ready certification.

data.title: Freight Technologies Announces Strategic Update on Transition to AI-Powered, Software-First Logistics Technology Company
data.description: A company is investigating strategic options for its online brokerage arm, such as a potential sale. This move comes as the company ramps up the commercialization of its in-house Software as a Service (SaaS) and Artificial Intelligence (AI) platform. The company is looking to divest its online brokerage business to focus more on its SaaS and AI endeavors.

data.title: Education Design Lab announces grantees for $3.5 million initiative to advance workforce mobility through credential transparency and skills validation
data.description: Today, Education Design Lab (the Lab) revealed their partnership with Credential Engine and the backing from Walmart to launch a new initiative in Washington on April 2, 2026. This initiative aims to provide financial support for solutions that assist working adults in managing the complex learn+work environment. With Walmart's support, the initiative will focus on addressing the challenges faced by working adults in adapting to the evolving job market.

data.title: Trimble to Acquire Document Crunch to Add AI-Powered Risk Management and Document Compliance to Trimble Construction One Project Delivery Ecosystem
data.description: Trimble, a company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol TRMB, revealed on April 2, 2026, its plans to acquire Document Crunch. This acquisition aims to assist customers in detecting and mitigating project risks like payment disputes and notification failures. Through this agreement, Trimble is set to enhance its capabilities in this area.

data.title: Hemlo Mining Corp. Announces $75 Million Repayment of Revolving Credit Facility
data.description: The reduction in debt on the balance sheet highlights a significant increase in cash flow subsequent to the purchase of the Hemlo Gold Mine. This financial development is particularly noteworthy given that it follows the acquisition of the mine. The figures mentioned throughout refer to U.S. dollars unless specified otherwise and have not been audited. This information was provided in a press release dated April 2, 2026, by Hemlo Mining Corp. (TSXV: HMMC), also known as Hemlo Mining.

data.title: CGI signs strategic collaboration agreement with AWS to accelerate AI and streamline digital transformation across U.S. public sector
data.description: CGI, a global company listed under symbols GIB (NYSE) and GIB.A (TSX) at cgi.com/newsroom, has announced collaborative strategies to enhance offerings in cybersecurity, fraud prevention, and citizen services. The partnership, declared on April 2, 2026, in Fairfax, VA, aims to provide innovative solutions to address these crucial areas. CGI, known as one of the most prominent independent companies globally, is set to leverage its expertise to enhance service delivery.
